quote_last: , many dances and many bourbons later, when I reached Mary's. Somehow, I felt surprised that the room was still the same. ... The clock ticked with an empty urgency, as though trying to catch up with the time. In the street a siren howled.
title: Invisible Man
author: Ralph Ellison

quote_first: I slept only fitfully after looking online. The phrases I’d read repeated in my head over and over again. When I woke up for what felt like the hundredth time, the Stormtrooper clock beside the bed read
title: What She Knew
author: Gilly MacMillan
